items.title: Description
items.description: Please enter the details of your request. A member of our support staff will respond as soon as possible.
items.raw_description: Please enter the details of your request. A member of our support staff will respond as soon as possible.

items.title: Summary
items.description: Summary of the ticket conversation between the agent and the end user.

items.title: Summary date and time
items.description: Date and time of the summary with the following format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss UTC'.

items.title: Summary locale
items.description: Locale of the summary with format 'en-US', 'fr-FR', etc.

items.title: Summary agent ID
items.description: Agent ID that generated the summary.

items.title: Required tasks
items.description: Shows whether required task lists are complete. The ticket cannot be solved until all required tasks are done or when no tasks are required.
